title: ruta chalepensis var. angustifolia
intro: Ruta chalepensis var. angustifolia, also known as Rue, is a perennial plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and inflammation. The health benefits of Ruta chalepensis var. angustifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Rue include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation.
